'use client'

import { useEffect, useState } from 'react'
import { motion } from 'framer-motion'
import { useAppDispatch, useAppSelector } from '@/state/hooks'
import {
  fetchRules,
  fetchTemplates,
  selectTemplates,
} from '@/state/slices/automationsSlice'
import type { AutomationTemplate } from '@/state/slices/automationsSlice'
import { AutomationList } from '@/components/automations/AutomationList'
import { AutomationBuilder } from '@/components/automations/AutomationBuilder'
import { Card, CardContent, CardHeader, CardTitle } from '@/components/ui/card'
import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button'
import { Badge } from '@/components/ui/badge'
import {
  Dialog,
  DialogContent,
  DialogHeader,
  DialogTitle,
  DialogTrigger,
} from '@/components/ui/dialog'
import { cn } from '@/lib/utils'
import { Plus, Zap, Sparkles } from 'lucide-react'
import { useRegisterPageContext } from '@/hooks/useRegisterPageContext'

export default function AutomationsPage() {
  const dispatch = useAppDispatch()
  const templates = useAppSelector(selectTemplates)
  const [isBuilderOpen, setIsBuilderOpen] = useState(false)
  const [selectedTemplate, setSelectedTemplate] = useState<AutomationTemplate | undefined>(undefined)

  useRegisterPageContext({
    pageTitle: 'Automations',
    visibleContent: {
      type: 'automations',
      templateCount: templates.length,
    },
  })

  useEffect(() => {
    dispatch(fetchRules())
    dispatch(fetchTemplates())
  }, [dispatch])

  const handleOpenBuilder = (template?: AutomationTemplate) => {
    setSelectedTemplate(template)
    setIsBuilderOpen(true)
  }

  const handleCloseBuilder = () => {
    setIsBuilderOpen(false)
    setSelectedTemplate(undefined)
  }

  return (
    <motion.div
      initial={{ opacity: 0 }}
      animate={{ opacity: 1 }}
      className="container mx-auto py-6 px-4 max-w-5xl"
    >
      {/* Header */}
      <motion.div
        initial={{ opacity: 0, y: -10 }}
        animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }}
        className="flex items-center justify-between mb-6"
      >
        <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
          <div className="flex items-center justify-center h-10 w-10 rounded-xl bg-purple-500/10 border border-purple-500/20">
            <Zap className="h-5 w-5 text-purple-400" />
          </div>
          <div>
            <h1 className="text-2xl font-bold text-purple-50">Automations</h1>
            <p className="text-sm text-muted-foreground">
              Set up rules to automate your workflow
            </p>
          </div>
        </div>

        <Dialog open={isBuilderOpen} onOpenChange={setIsBuilderOpen}>
          <DialogTrigger asChild>
            <Button
              onClick={() => handleOpenBuilder()}
              className={cn(
                'bg-purple-600 hover:bg-purple-500 text-white',
                'shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(168,85,247,0.3)]',
                'transition-all duration-200 hover:shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(168,85,247,0.5)]',
                'hover:scale-105'
              )}
            >
              <Plus className="h-4 w-4 mr-2" />
              Create Automation
            </Button>
          </DialogTrigger>
          <DialogContent className="bg-gray-950 border-purple-500/30 max-w-lg">
            <DialogHeader>
              <DialogTitle className="text-purple-100">
                {selectedTemplate ? 'Create from Template' : 'New Automation'}
              </DialogTitle>
            </DialogHeader>
            <AutomationBuilder
              onClose={handleCloseBuilder}
              template={selectedTemplate}
            />
          </DialogContent>
        </Dialog>
      </motion.div>

      {/* Automation Rules */}
      <motion.div
        initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 10 }}
        animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }}
        transition={{ delay: 0.1 }}
        className="mb-8"
      >
        <h2 className="text-lg font-semibold text-purple-100 mb-4">Your Rules</h2>
        <AutomationList />
      </motion.div>

      {/* Templates Gallery */}
      {templates.length > 0 && (
        <motion.div
          initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 10 }}
          animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }}
          transition={{ delay: 0.2 }}
        >
          <div className="flex items-center gap-2 mb-4">
            <Sparkles className="h-5 w-5 text-purple-400" />
            <h2 className="text-lg font-semibold text-purple-100">Templates</h2>
          </div>

          <div className="grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-4">
            {templates.map((template, index) => (
              <motion.div
                key={template.id}
                initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 10 }}
                animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }}
                transition={{ delay: 0.25 + index * 0.05 }}
              >
                <Card
                  className={cn(
                    'cursor-pointer border border-purple-500/15 bg-black/40 backdrop-blur-sm',
                    'transition-all duration-200',
                    'hover:border-purple-500/40 hover:shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(168,85,247,0.15)]',
                    'hover:scale-[1.02]'
                  )}
                  onClick={() => handleOpenBuilder(template)}
                >
                  <CardHeader className="pb-2">
                    <CardTitle className="text-sm font-semibold text-purple-100">
                      {template.name}
                    </CardTitle>
                  </CardHeader>
                  <CardContent>
                    <p className="text-xs text-muted-foreground mb-3 line-clamp-2">
                      {template.description}
                    </p>
                    <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
                      <Badge
                        variant="outline"
                        className="text-[10px] border-purple-500/30 text-purple-300"
                      >
                        {template.triggerType.replace(/_/g, ' ')}
                      </Badge>
                      <span className="text-muted-foreground text-[10px]">then</span>
                      <Badge
                        variant="outline"
                        className="text-[10px] border-purple-500/30 text-purple-300"
                      >
                        {template.actionType.replace(/_/g, ' ')}
                      </Badge>
                    </div>
                  </CardContent>
                </Card>
              </motion.div>
            ))}
          </div>
        </motion.div>
      )}
    </motion.div>
  )
}


================================================================
FILE: src/app/(dashboard)/calendar/page.tsx
================================================================
'use client'

import { useEffect, useState } from 'react'
import { ChevronLeft, ChevronRight, Calendar, Bookmark, CheckSquare, Target } from 'lucide-react'
import { Card, CardContent, CardHeader, CardTitle } from '@/components/ui/card'
import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button'
import { Tabs, TabsList, TabsTrigger } from '@/components/ui/tabs'
import { PageContainer } from '@/components/layout/PageContainer'
import { FAB } from '@/components/common/FAB'
import { EmptyState } from '@/components/common/EmptyState'
import { useAppDispatch, useAppSelector } from '@/state/hooks'
import {
  selectAllEvents,
  selectSelectedDate,
  selectSelectedView,
  setSelectedDate,
  setSelectedView,
  fetchEvents,
} from '@/state/slices/calendarSlice'
import { selectAllHabits, fetchHabits } from '@/state/slices/habitsSlice'
import { selectAllTasks, fetchTasks } from '@/state/slices/tasksSlice'
import { openModal } from '@/state/slices/uiSlice'
import { cn } from '@/lib/utils'
import { useRegisterPageContext } from '@/hooks/useRegisterPageContext'
import type { CalendarEvent, Habit, Task } from '@/types'

export default function CalendarPage() {
  const dispatch = useAppDispatch()
  const events = useAppSelector(selectAllEvents)
  const habits = useAppSelector(selectAllHabits)
  const tasks = useAppSelector(selectAllTasks)
  const selectedDate = useAppSelector(selectSelectedDate)
  const selectedView = useAppSelector(selectSelectedView)
  const [currentMonth, setCurrentMonth] = useState(new Date())

  useRegisterPageContext({
    pageTitle: 'Calendar',
    activeView: selectedView,
    visibleContent: {
      type: 'calendar',
      selectedDate,
      eventCount: events.length,
    },
  })

  useEffect(() => {
    dispatch(fetchHabits())
    dispatch(fetchTasks())
  }, [dispatch])

  useEffect(() => {
    const start = new Date(currentMonth.getFullYear(), currentMonth.getMonth(), 1)
    const end = new Date(currentMonth.getFullYear(), currentMonth.getMonth() + 1, 0)
    dispatch(fetchEvents({
      start: start.toISOString().split('T')[0],
      end: end.toISOString().split('T')[0],
    }))
  }, [dispatch, currentMonth])

  // Find the habit associated with a calendar event
  const findHabitForEvent = (event: CalendarEvent): Habit | null => {
    // Habit events have format "emoji name" like "🧘 Morning meditation"
    const title = event.title || ''
    for (const habit of habits) {
      const habitTitle = `${habit.icon} ${habit.name}`
      if (title === habitTitle) {
        return habit
      }
    }
    return null
  }

  // Handle clicking on an event
  const handleEventClick = (event: CalendarEvent) => {
    const habit = findHabitForEvent(event)
    if (habit) {
      // Open the habit plan modal with the habit
      dispatch(openModal({ modalName: 'habitPlan', data: { habit } }))
    }
  }

  const getDaysInMonth = () => {
    const year = currentMonth.getFullYear()
    const month = currentMonth.getMonth()
    const firstDay = new Date(year, month, 1)
    const lastDay = new Date(year, month + 1, 0)
    const days: (Date | null)[] = []

    for (let i = 0; i < firstDay.getDay(); i++) {
      days.push(null)
    }

    for (let i = 1; i <= lastDay.getDate(); i++) {
      days.push(new Date(year, month, i))
    }

    return days
  }

  const getWeekDays = () => {
    const selected = new Date(selectedDate)
    const dayOfWeek = selected.getDay()
    const weekStart = new Date(selected)
    weekStart.setDate(selected.getDate() - dayOfWeek)

    const days: Date[] = []
    for (let i = 0; i < 7; i++) {
      const d = new Date(weekStart)
      d.setDate(weekStart.getDate() + i)
      days.push(d)
    }
    return days
  }

  const getEventsForDate = (date: Date) => {
    const dateStr = date.toISOString().split('T')[0]
    return events.filter(e => {
      const eventDate = new Date(e.startTime).toISOString().split('T')[0]
      return eventDate === dateStr
    })
  }

  const getTasksForDate = (date: Date) => {
    const dateStr = date.toISOString().split('T')[0]
    return tasks.filter(t => {
      if (t.status === 'completed') return false
      // Check scheduledStart first, then deadline
      const taskDate = t.scheduledStart
        ? new Date(t.scheduledStart).toISOString().split('T')[0]
        : t.deadline
          ? new Date(t.deadline).toISOString().split('T')[0]
          : null
      return taskDate === dateStr
    })
  }

  const getHabitsForDate = (date: Date) => {
    const dateStr = date.toISOString().split('T')[0]
    const dayOfWeek = date.getDay()
    const daysOfWeek = ['sunday', 'monday', 'tuesday', 'wednesday', 'thursday', 'friday', 'saturday']
    const dayName = daysOfWeek[dayOfWeek]

    return habits.filter(h => {
      if (!h.isActive) return false
      if (h.frequency === 'daily') return true
      if (h.frequency === 'weekly') {
        const config = h.frequencyConfig as { days?: string[] } | undefined
        return config?.days?.includes(dayName) ?? dayOfWeek === 1
      }
      return false
    })
  }

  const hasItemsOnDate = (date: Date) => {
    const dayEvents = getEventsForDate(date)
    const dayTasks = getTasksForDate(date)
    const dayHabits = getHabitsForDate(date)
    return {
      events: dayEvents.length,
      tasks: dayTasks.length,
      habits: dayHabits.length,
      total: dayEvents.length + dayTasks.length + dayHabits.length,
    }
  }

  const navigateMonth = (direction: 'prev' | 'next') => {
    setCurrentMonth(prev => {
      const newMonth = new Date(prev)
      if (direction === 'prev') {
        newMonth.setMonth(prev.getMonth() - 1)
      } else {
        newMonth.setMonth(prev.getMonth() + 1)
      }
      return newMonth
    })
  }

  const navigateDay = (direction: 'prev' | 'next') => {
    const current = new Date(selectedDate)
    if (direction === 'prev') {
      current.setDate(current.getDate() - 1)
    } else {
      current.setDate(current.getDate() + 1)
    }
    dispatch(setSelectedDate(current.toISOString().split('T')[0]))
  }

  const navigateWeek = (direction: 'prev' | 'next') => {
    const current = new Date(selectedDate)
    if (direction === 'prev') {
      current.setDate(current.getDate() - 7)
    } else {
      current.setDate(current.getDate() + 7)
    }
    dispatch(setSelectedDate(current.toISOString().split('T')[0]))
  }

  const today = new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0]
  const days = getDaysInMonth()
  const weekDays = getWeekDays()

  // Generate time slots for day view
  const timeSlots = Array.from({ length: 24 }, (_, i) => i)

  const getHeaderText = () => {
    if (selectedView === 'day') {
      return new Date(selectedDate).toLocaleDateString('default', {
        weekday: 'long',
        month: 'long',
        day: 'numeric',
        year: 'numeric'
      })
    }
    if (selectedView === 'week') {
      const weekStart = weekDays[0]
      const weekEnd = weekDays[6]
      return `${weekStart.toLocaleDateString('default', { month: 'short', day: 'numeric' })} - ${weekEnd.toLocaleDateString('default', { month: 'short', day: 'numeric', year: 'numeric' })}`
    }
    return currentMonth.toLocaleString('default', { month: 'long', year: 'numeric' })
  }

  const handleNavigate = (direction: 'prev' | 'next') => {
    if (selectedView === 'day') {
      navigateDay(direction)
    } else if (selectedView === 'week') {
      navigateWeek(direction)
    } else {
      navigateMonth(direction)
    }
  }

  return (
    <PageContainer>
      <div className="space-y-4">
        <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
          <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
            <Button
              variant="outline"
              size="icon"
              onClick={() => handleNavigate('prev')}
            >
              <ChevronLeft className="h-4 w-4" />
            </Button>
            <h2 className="text-lg font-semibold min-w-[200px] text-center">
              {getHeaderText()}
            </h2>
            <Button
              variant="outline"
              size="icon"
              onClick={() => handleNavigate('next')}
            >
              <ChevronRight className="h-4 w-4" />
            </Button>
          </div>

          <Tabs value={selectedView} onValueChange={(v) => dispatch(setSelectedView(v as 'month' | 'week' | 'day'))}>
            <TabsList>
              <TabsTrigger value="month">Month</TabsTrigger>
              <TabsTrigger value="week">Week</TabsTrigger>
              <TabsTrigger value="day">Day</TabsTrigger>
            </TabsList>
          </Tabs>
        </div>

        {/* Month View */}
        {selectedView === 'month' && (
          <Card>
            <CardContent className="p-2 md:p-4">
              <div className="grid grid-cols-7 gap-1 mb-2">
                {['Sun', 'Mon', 'Tue', 'Wed', 'Thu', 'Fri', 'Sat'].map(day => (
                  <div key={day} className="text-center text-xs font-medium text-muted-foreground py-2">
                    {day}
                  </div>
                ))}
              </div>

              <div className="grid grid-cols-7 gap-1">
                {days.map((date, index) => {
                  if (!date) {
                    return <div key={`empty-${index}`} className="aspect-square" />
                  }

                  const dateStr = date.toISOString().split('T')[0]
                  const isToday = dateStr === today
                  const isSelected = dateStr === selectedDate
                  const items = hasItemsOnDate(date)

                  return (
                    <button
                      key={dateStr}
                      onClick={() => dispatch(setSelectedDate(dateStr))}
                      className={cn(
                        'aspect-square p-1 rounded-lg text-sm transition-colors relative',
                        'hover:bg-accent focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-ring',
                        isToday && 'bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90',
                        isSelected && !isToday && 'bg-accent',
                      )}
                    >
                      {/* Bookmark indicator */}
                      {items.total > 0 && (
                        <div className={cn(
                          'absolute -top-0.5 -right-0.5 w-0 h-0',
                          'border-l-[8px] border-l-transparent',
                          'border-t-[8px]',
                          items.habits > 0 ? 'border-t-blue-500' :
                          items.tasks > 0 ? 'border-t-orange-500' :
                          'border-t-green-500'
                        )} />
                      )}
                      <span className="block">{date.getDate()}</span>
                      {/* Item type indicators */}
                      {items.total > 0 && (
                        <div className="absolute bottom-0.5 left-1/2 -translate-x-1/2 flex gap-0.5">
                          {items.habits > 0 && (
                            <div className={cn(
                              'w-1.5 h-1.5 rounded-full',
                              isToday ? 'bg-blue-200' : 'bg-blue-500'
                            )} title={`${items.habits} habit(s)`} />
                          )}
                          {items.tasks > 0 && (
                            <div className={cn(
                              'w-1.5 h-1.5 rounded-full',
                              isToday ? 'bg-orange-200' : 'bg-orange-500'
                            )} title={`${items.tasks} task(s)`} />
                          )}
                          {items.events > 0 && (
                            <div className={cn(
                              'w-1.5 h-1.5 rounded-full',
                              isToday ? 'bg-green-200' : 'bg-green-500'
                            )} title={`${items.events} event(s)`} />
                          )}
                        </div>
                      )}
                    </button>
                  )
                })}
              </div>
            </CardContent>
          </Card>
        )}

        {/* Week View */}
        {selectedView === 'week' && (
          <Card>
            <CardContent className="p-2 md:p-4">
              <div className="grid grid-cols-7 gap-2">
                {weekDays.map((date) => {
                  const dateStr = date.toISOString().split('T')[0]
                  const isToday = dateStr === today
                  const isSelected = dateStr === selectedDate
                  const dayEvents = getEventsForDate(date)

                  return (
                    <div key={dateStr} className="space-y-2">
                      <button
                        onClick={() => dispatch(setSelectedDate(dateStr))}
                        className={cn(
                          'w-full p-2 rounded-lg text-center transition-colors',
                          'hover:bg-accent focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-ring',
                          isToday && 'bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90',
                          isSelected && !isToday && 'bg-accent',
                        )}
                      >
                        <span className="block text-xs text-muted-foreground">
                          {date.toLocaleDateString('default', { weekday: 'short' })}
                        </span>
                        <span className="block text-lg font-semibold">{date.getDate()}</span>
                      </button>
                      <div className="space-y-1 min-h-[100px]">
                        {dayEvents.slice(0, 3).map((event) => {
                          const habit = findHabitForEvent(event)
                          return (
                            <button
                              key={event.id}
                              className="p-1.5 rounded bg-primary/10 text-xs truncate cursor-pointer hover:bg-primary/20 w-full text-left"
                              onClick={() => habit ? handleEventClick(event) : dispatch(setSelectedDate(dateStr))}
                            >
                              {event.title}
                            </button>
                          )
                        })}
                        {dayEvents.length > 3 && (
                          <p className="text-xs text-muted-foreground text-center">
                            +{dayEvents.length - 3} more
                          </p>
                        )}
                      </div>
                    </div>
                  )
                })}
              </div>
            </CardContent>
          </Card>
        )}

        {/* Day View */}
        {selectedView === 'day' && (
          <Card>
            <CardContent className="p-2 md:p-4">
              <div className="space-y-1">
                {timeSlots.map((hour) => {
                  const hourEvents = getEventsForDate(new Date(selectedDate)).filter(event => {
                    const eventHour = new Date(event.startTime).getHours()
                    return eventHour === hour
                  })

                  return (
                    <div key={hour} className="flex gap-3 min-h-[48px]">
                      <div className="w-16 text-xs text-muted-foreground py-2 text-right">
                        {hour === 0 ? '12 AM' : hour < 12 ? `${hour} AM` : hour === 12 ? '12 PM' : `${hour - 12} PM`}
                      </div>
                      <div className="flex-1 border-t border-border py-1">
                        {hourEvents.map((event) => {
                          const habit = findHabitForEvent(event)
                          return (
                            <button
                              key={event.id}
                              onClick={() => handleEventClick(event)}
                              className="p-2 rounded bg-primary/10 mb-1 cursor-pointer hover:bg-primary/20 w-full text-left"
                            >
                              <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
                                <p className="font-medium text-sm">{event.title}</p>
                                {habit && (
                                  <span className="text-xs text-primary">View Plan →</span>
                                )}
                              </div>
                              <p className="text-xs text-muted-foreground">
                                {new Date(event.startTime).toLocaleTimeString([], { hour: 'numeric', minute: '2-digit' })} - {new Date(event.endTime).toLocaleTimeString([], { hour: 'numeric', minute: '2-digit' })}
                              </p>
                            </button>
                          )
                        })}
                      </div>
                    </div>
                  )
                })}
              </div>
            </CardContent>
          </Card>
        )}

        {/* Items list (shown for month view only) */}
        {selectedView === 'month' && (
          <Card>
            <CardHeader>
              <CardTitle className="text-base flex items-center gap-2">
                <Bookmark className="h-4 w-4" />
                {new Date(selectedDate).toLocaleDateString('default', {
                  weekday: 'long',
                  month: 'long',
                  day: 'numeric'
                })}
              </CardTitle>
            </CardHeader>
            <CardContent>
              {(() => {
                const selectedDateObj = new Date(selectedDate)
                const dayEvents = getEventsForDate(selectedDateObj)
                const dayTasks = getTasksForDate(selectedDateObj)
                const dayHabits = getHabitsForDate(selectedDateObj)
                const totalItems = dayEvents.length + dayTasks.length + dayHabits.length

                if (totalItems === 0) {
                  return (
                    <EmptyState
                      icon={Calendar}
                      title="Nothing scheduled"
                      description="No events, tasks, or habits for this day"
                      actionLabel="Add Event"
                      onAction={() => dispatch(openModal({ modalName: 'createEvent' }))}
                    />
                  )
                }

                return (
                  <div className="space-y-4">
                    {/* Habits Section */}
                    {dayHabits.length > 0 && (
                      <div>
                        <div className="flex items-center gap-2 mb-2">
                          <Target className="h-4 w-4 text-blue-500" />
                          <span className="text-sm font-medium text-muted-foreground">Habits ({dayHabits.length})</span>
                        </div>
                        <div className="space-y-2">
                          {dayHabits.map((habit) => (
                            <button
                              key={habit.id}
                              onClick={() => dispatch(openModal({ modalName: 'habitPlan', data: { habit } }))}
                              className="flex items-start gap-3 p-3 rounded-lg bg-blue-500/10 w-full text-left transition-colors hover:bg-blue-500/20"
                            >
                              <div className="w-1 h-full min-h-[40px] rounded-full bg-blue-500" />
                              <div className="flex-1">
                                <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
                                  <p className="font-medium flex items-center gap-2">
                                    <span>{habit.icon}</span>
                                    {habit.name}
                                  </p>
                                  <span className="text-xs text-blue-500 bg-blue-500/10 px-2 py-0.5 rounded-full">
                                    View Plan
                                  </span>
                                </div>
                                {habit.reminderTime && (
                                  <p className="text-sm text-muted-foreground">
                                    Reminder at {habit.reminderTime}
                                  </p>
                                )}
                              </div>
                            </button>
                          ))}
                        </div>
                      </div>
                    )}

                    {/* Tasks Section */}
                    {dayTasks.length > 0 && (
                      <div>
                        <div className="flex items-center gap-2 mb-2">
                          <CheckSquare className="h-4 w-4 text-orange-500" />
                          <span className="text-sm font-medium text-muted-foreground">Tasks ({dayTasks.length})</span>
                        </div>
                        <div className="space-y-2">
                          {dayTasks.map((task) => (
                            <div
                              key={task.id}
                              className="flex items-start gap-3 p-3 rounded-lg bg-orange-500/10"
                            >
                              <div className="w-1 h-full min-h-[40px] rounded-full bg-orange-500" />
                              <div className="flex-1">
                                <p className="font-medium">{task.title}</p>
                                {task.scheduledStart && (
                                  <p className="text-sm text-muted-foreground">
                                    Scheduled for {new Date(task.scheduledStart).toLocaleTimeString([], {
                                      hour: 'numeric',
                                      minute: '2-digit'
                                    })}
                                  </p>
                                )}
                                {task.estimatedMinutes && (
                                  <p className="text-xs text-muted-foreground">
                                    Est. {task.estimatedMinutes} min
                                  </p>
                                )}
                              </div>
                            </div>
                          ))}
                        </div>
                      </div>
                    )}

                    {/* Events Section */}
                    {dayEvents.length > 0 && (
                      <div>
                        <div className="flex items-center gap-2 mb-2">
                          <Calendar className="h-4 w-4 text-green-500" />
                          <span className="text-sm font-medium text-muted-foreground">Events ({dayEvents.length})</span>
                        </div>
                        <div className="space-y-2">
                          {dayEvents.map((event) => {
                            const habit = findHabitForEvent(event)
                            return (
                              <button
                                key={event.id}
                                onClick={() => handleEventClick(event)}
                                className={cn(
                                  "flex items-start gap-3 p-3 rounded-lg bg-green-500/10 w-full text-left transition-colors",
                                  habit && "hover:bg-green-500/20 cursor-pointer"
                                )}
                              >
                                <div className="w-1 h-full min-h-[40px] rounded-full bg-green-500" />
                                <div className="flex-1">
                                  <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
                                    <p className="font-medium">
                                      {event.title}
                                      {(event as Record<string, unknown>).metadata && ((event as Record<string, unknown>).metadata as Record<string, unknown>)?.externalSource === 'google' && (
                                        <span className="ml-2 text-xs text-blue-400 bg-blue-500/10 px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded">Google</span>
                                      )}
                                    </p>
                                    {habit && (
                                      <span className="text-xs text-green-600 bg-green-500/10 px-2 py-0.5 rounded-full">
                                        View Plan
                                      </span>
                                    )}
                                  </div>
                                  <p className="text-sm text-muted-foreground">
                                    {new Date(event.startTime).toLocaleTimeString([], {
                                      hour: 'numeric',
                                      minute: '2-digit'
                                    })} - {new Date(event.endTime).toLocaleTimeString([], {
                                      hour: 'numeric',
                                      minute: '2-digit'
                                    })}
                                  </p>
                                  {event.location && (
                                    <p className="text-sm text-muted-foreground">{event.location}</p>
                                  )}
                                </div>
                              </button>
                            )
                          })}
                        </div>
                      </div>
                    )}
                  </div>
                )
              })()}
            </CardContent>
          </Card>
        )}
      </div>

      <FAB onClick={() => dispatch(openModal({ modalName: 'createEvent' }))} label="Add Event" />
    </PageContainer>
  )
}


================================================================
FILE: src/app/(dashboard)/dashboard/page.tsx
================================================================
'use client'

import { useEffect, useState } from 'react'
import { motion } from 'framer-motion'
import {
  Calendar,
  CheckSquare,
  UtensilsCrossed,
  Lightbulb,
  Clock,
  TrendingUp,
  Plus,
  MessageCircle,
  ListTodo,
  ArrowRight,
  Sparkles,
} from 'lucide-react'
import { Card, CardContent, CardDescription, CardHeader, CardTitle } from '@/components/ui/card'
import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button'
import { PageContainer } from '@/components/layout/PageContainer'
import { GamificationWidget } from '@/components/gamification/GamificationWidget'
import { LevelUpModal } from '@/components/gamification/LevelUpModal'
import { Mascot } from '@/components/ui/mascot'
import { FadeIn, HoverCard, AnimatedProgress } from '@/components/ui/animated'
import { CelebrationToast } from '@/components/ui/celebration'
import { useAppDispatch, useAppSelector } from '@/state/hooks'
import { selectAllEvents, fetchEvents } from '@/state/slices/calendarSlice'
import { selectActiveHabits, selectTodayCompletions, fetchHabits } from '@/state/slices/habitsSlice'
import { selectMealsByDate, fetchWeekMeals } from '@/state/slices/mealPlanningSlice'
import { selectUnprocessedThoughts, fetchThoughts } from '@/state/slices/thoughtsSlice'
import { selectPendingTasks, fetchTasks } from '@/state/slices/tasksSlice'
import { openModal } from '@/state/slices/uiSlice'
import { useRegisterPageContext } from '@/hooks/useRegisterPageContext'
import Link from 'next/link'

export default function DashboardPage() {
  const dispatch = useAppDispatch()
  const today = new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0]
  const [showCelebration, setShowCelebration] = useState(false)
  const [celebrationMessage, setCelebrationMessage] = useState('')

  const events = useAppSelector(selectAllEvents)
  const habits = useAppSelector(selectActiveHabits)
  const todayCompletions = useAppSelector(selectTodayCompletions)
  const todayMeals = useAppSelector(selectMealsByDate(today))
  const unprocessedThoughts = useAppSelector(selectUnprocessedThoughts)
  const pendingTasks = useAppSelector(selectPendingTasks)

  useRegisterPageContext({
    pageTitle: 'Dashboard',
    visibleContent: {
      type: 'dashboard',
      eventCount: events.length,
      activeHabitCount: habits.length,
      habitsCompletedToday: todayCompletions.length,
      pendingTaskCount: pendingTasks.length,
      todayMealCount: todayMeals.length,
      unprocessedThoughtCount: unprocessedThoughts.length,
    },
  })

  useEffect(() => {
    const endDate = new Date()
    endDate.setDate(endDate.getDate() + 7)
    dispatch(fetchEvents({ start: today, end: endDate.toISOString().split('T')[0] }))
    dispatch(fetchHabits())
    dispatch(fetchWeekMeals(today))
    dispatch(fetchThoughts())
    dispatch(fetchTasks())
  }, [dispatch, today])

  const todayEvents = events.filter(e => {
    const eventDate = new Date(e.startTime).toISOString().split('T')[0]
    return eventDate === today
  })

  const habitCompletionRate = habits.length > 0
    ? Math.round((todayCompletions.length / habits.length) * 100)
    : 0

  // Detect if this is a "new user" with no data
  const isNewUser = events.length === 0 && habits.length === 0 && pendingTasks.length === 0

  // Show celebration when all habits are done
  useEffect(() => {
    if (habits.length > 0 && todayCompletions.length === habits.length) {
      setCelebrationMessage('All habits done!')
      setShowCelebration(true)
    }
  }, [todayCompletions.length, habits.length])

  const greeting = () => {
    const hour = new Date().getHours()
    if (hour < 12) return 'Good morning'
    if (hour < 18) return 'Good afternoon'
    return 'Good evening'
  }

  const getMascotMood = () => {
    if (habitCompletionRate === 100) return 'celebrating' as const
    if (habitCompletionRate >= 50) return 'encouraging' as const
    const hour = new Date().getHours()
    if (hour >= 22 || hour < 6) return 'sleeping' as const
    return 'greeting' as const
  }

  const getMascotMessage = () => {
    if (isNewUser) return 'Welcome! Let\'s get you set up.'
    if (habitCompletionRate === 100) return 'All habits done! Amazing!'
    if (habitCompletionRate >= 50) return 'Great progress today!'
    if (pendingTasks.length > 5) return 'Lots to do - you got this!'
    return `${greeting()}! Ready to crush it?`
  }

  return (
    <PageContainer>
      <LevelUpModal />
      <CelebrationToast
        show={showCelebration}
        message={celebrationMessage}
        xp={10}
        onComplete={() => setShowCelebration(false)}
      />
      <motion.div
        initial={{ opacity: 0 }}
        animate={{ opacity: 1 }}
        className="space-y-6"
      >
        {/* Header with Mascot and Quick Actions */}
        <FadeIn className="flex flex-col md:flex-row md:items-center md:justify-between gap-4">
          <div className="flex items-center gap-4">
            <motion.div
              initial={{ scale: 0 }}
              animate={{ scale: 1 }}
              transition={{ type: 'spring', delay: 0.2 }}
            >
              <Mascot
                mood={getMascotMood()}
                size="md"
                showMessage
                message={getMascotMessage()}
              />
            </motion.div>
            <div>
              <h2 className="text-2xl font-bold tracking-tight">{greeting()}</h2>
              <p className="text-muted-foreground">
                {isNewUser
                  ? 'Welcome to Life Organizer — let\'s get started!'
                  : 'Here\'s what\'s on your plate today'}
              </p>
            </div>
          </div>
          <motion.div
            initial={{ opacity: 0, x: 20 }}
            animate={{ opacity: 1, x: 0 }}
            transition={{ delay: 0.3 }}
            className="flex flex-wrap gap-2"
          >
            <Button
              size="sm"
              variant="outline"
              onClick={() => dispatch(openModal({ modalName: 'createEvent' }))}
              className="transition-transform hover:scale-105"
            >
              <Plus className="h-4 w-4 mr-1" />
              Event
            </Button>
            <Button
              size="sm"
              variant="outline"
              onClick={() => dispatch(openModal({ modalName: 'createTask' }))}
              className="transition-transform hover:scale-105"
            >
              <ListTodo className="h-4 w-4 mr-1" />
              Task
            </Button>
            <Link href="/live-assistant">
              <Button size="sm" variant="outline" className="transition-transform hover:scale-105">
                <MessageCircle className="h-4 w-4 mr-1" />
                Ask AI
              </Button>
            </Link>
            <Link href="/progress">
              <Button size="sm" className="transition-transform hover:scale-105">
                <TrendingUp className="h-4 w-4 mr-1" />
                Progress
              </Button>
            </Link>
          </motion.div>
        </FadeIn>

        {/* Onboarding Card for new users */}
        {isNewUser && (
          <motion.div
            initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 20 }}
            animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }}
            transition={{ delay: 0.2 }}
          >
            <Card className="border-primary/30 bg-gradient-to-r from-primary/5 via-purple-500/5 to-pink-500/5">
              <CardHeader>
                <CardTitle className="flex items-center gap-2">
                  <Sparkles className="h-5 w-5 text-primary" />
                  Get Started
                </CardTitle>
                <CardDescription>Set up your organizer in a few quick steps</CardDescription>
              </CardHeader>
              <CardContent>
                <div className="grid gap-3 sm:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-4">
                  {[
                    {
                      label: 'Create your first task',
                      description: 'Add something you need to get done',
                      action: () => dispatch(openModal({ modalName: 'createTask' })),
                      icon: ListTodo,
                    },
                    {
                      label: 'Set up a habit',
                      description: 'Build a daily routine',
                      action: () => dispatch(openModal({ modalName: 'createHabit' })),
                      icon: CheckSquare,
                    },
                    {
                      label: 'Add a calendar event',
                      description: 'Schedule something upcoming',
                      action: () => dispatch(openModal({ modalName: 'createEvent' })),
                      icon: Calendar,
                    },
                    {
                      label: 'Talk to your AI assistant',
                      description: 'Ask anything or get help planning',
                      href: '/live-assistant',
                      icon: MessageCircle,
                    },
                  ].map((step, i) => (
                    <motion.div
                      key={step.label}
                      initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 10 }}
                      animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }}
                      transition={{ delay: 0.3 + i * 0.1 }}
                    >
                      {'href' in step && step.href ? (
                        <Link href={step.href}>
                          <OnboardingStep icon={step.icon} label={step.label} description={step.description} />
                        </Link>
                      ) : (
                        <button onClick={step.action} className="w-full text-left">
                          <OnboardingStep icon={step.icon} label={step.label} description={step.description} />
                        </button>
                      )}
                    </motion.div>
                  ))}
                </div>
              </CardContent>
            </Card>
          </motion.div>
        )}

        {/* Gamification Widget - Compact */}
        <GamificationWidget compact />

        {/* Stats Cards with Animations */}
        <div className="grid gap-4 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-4">
          {[
            {
              href: '/calendar',
              title: "Today's Events",
              icon: Calendar,
              value: todayEvents.length,
              subtitle: todayEvents.length === 1 ? 'event scheduled' : 'events scheduled',
              color: 'from-blue-500 to-cyan-500',
            },
            {
              href: '/habits',
              title: 'Habits Completed',
              icon: CheckSquare,
              value: `${todayCompletions.length}/${habits.length}`,
              progress: habitCompletionRate,
              color: 'from-green-500 to-emerald-500',
            },
            {
              href: '/meal-planning',
              title: "Today's Meals",
              icon: UtensilsCrossed,
              value: todayMeals.length,
              subtitle: todayMeals.length === 1 ? 'meal planned' : 'meals planned',
              color: 'from-orange-500 to-amber-500',
            },
            {
              href: '/tasks',
              title: 'Pending Tasks',
              icon: ListTodo,
              value: pendingTasks.length,
              subtitle: pendingTasks.length === 1 ? 'task to do' : 'tasks to do',
              color: 'from-purple-500 to-pink-500',
            },
          ].map((stat, index) => (
            <motion.div
              key={stat.href}
              initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 20 }}
              animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }}
              transition={{ delay: index * 0.1 }}
            >
              <Link href={stat.href}>
                <HoverCard>
                  <Card className="relative overflow-hidden cursor-pointer group">
                    <div className={`absolute inset-0 bg-gradient-to-br ${stat.color} opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-5 transition-opacity`} />
                    <CardHeader className="flex flex-row items-center justify-between space-y-0 pb-2">
                      <CardTitle className="text-sm font-medium">{stat.title}</CardTitle>
                      <motion.div
                        whileHover={{ rotate: 15, scale: 1.2 }}
                        transition={{ type: 'spring' }}
                      >
                        <stat.icon className="h-4 w-4 text-muted-foreground" />
                      </motion.div>
                    </CardHeader>
                    <CardContent>
                      <motion.div
                        key={String(stat.value)}
                        initial={{ scale: 0.5, opacity: 0 }}
                        animate={{ scale: 1, opacity: 1 }}
                        className="text-2xl font-bold"
                      >
                        {stat.value}
                      </motion.div>
                      {stat.progress !== undefined ? (
                        <AnimatedProgress value={stat.progress} className="mt-2" />
                      ) : (
                        <p className="text-xs text-muted-foreground">{stat.subtitle}</p>
                      )}
                    </CardContent>
                  </Card>
                </HoverCard>
              </Link>
            </motion.div>
          ))}
        </div>

        {/* Main Content Grid */}
        <div className="grid gap-4 lg:grid-cols-3">
          {/* Left Column - Schedule & Tasks/Habits */}
          <div className="lg:col-span-2 space-y-4">
            <Card>
              <CardHeader className="flex flex-row items-center justify-between">
                <div>
                  <CardTitle className="flex items-center gap-2">
                    <Clock className="h-5 w-5" />
                    Today&apos;s Schedule
                  </CardTitle>
                  <CardDescription>Your upcoming events for today</CardDescription>
                </div>
                <Link href="/calendar">
                  <Button variant="ghost" size="sm" className="text-xs">
                    View all <ArrowRight className="h-3 w-3 ml-1" />
                  </Button>
                </Link>
              </CardHeader>
              <CardContent>
                {todayEvents.length === 0 ? (
                  <div className="text-center py-6">
                    <Calendar className="h-8 w-8 text-muted-foreground/40 mx-auto mb-2" />
                    <p className="text-sm text-muted-foreground">No events today</p>
                    <Button
                      variant="link"
                      size="sm"
                      className="text-xs mt-1"
                      onClick={() => dispatch(openModal({ modalName: 'createEvent' }))}
                    >
                      <Plus className="h-3 w-3 mr-1" />
                      Add an event
                    </Button>
                  </div>
                ) : (
                  <div className="space-y-3">
                    {todayEvents.slice(0, 5).map((event) => (
                      <div key={event.id} className="flex items-center gap-3 py-2">
                        <div className="w-1 h-10 rounded-full bg-primary" />
                        <div className="flex-1 min-w-0">
                          <p className="font-medium truncate">{event.title}</p>
                          <p className="text-xs text-muted-foreground">
                            {new Date(event.startTime).toLocaleTimeString([], {
                              hour: 'numeric',
                              minute: '2-digit'
                            })}
                          </p>
                        </div>
                      </div>
                    ))}
                    {todayEvents.length > 5 && (
                      <Link href="/calendar" className="text-xs text-primary hover:underline block text-center">
                        +{todayEvents.length - 5} more events
                      </Link>
                    )}
                  </div>
                )}
              </CardContent>
            </Card>

            <div className="grid gap-4 md:grid-cols-2">
              <Card>
                <CardHeader className="flex flex-row items-center justify-between">
                  <div>
                    <CardTitle className="flex items-center gap-2">
                      <CheckSquare className="h-5 w-5" />
                      Today&apos;s Habits
                    </CardTitle>
                    <CardDescription>Track your daily habits</CardDescription>
                  </div>
                  <Link href="/habits">
                    <Button variant="ghost" size="sm" className="text-xs">
                      View all <ArrowRight className="h-3 w-3 ml-1" />
                    </Button>
                  </Link>
                </CardHeader>
                <CardContent>
                  {habits.length === 0 ? (
                    <div className="text-center py-6">
                      <CheckSquare className="h-8 w-8 text-muted-foreground/40 mx-auto mb-2" />
                      <p className="text-sm text-muted-foreground">No habits yet</p>
                      <Button
                        variant="link"
                        size="sm"
                        className="text-xs mt-1"
                        onClick={() => dispatch(openModal({ modalName: 'createHabit' }))}
                      >
                        <Plus className="h-3 w-3 mr-1" />
                        Create a habit
                      </Button>
                    </div>
                  ) : (
                    <div className="space-y-3">
                      {habits.slice(0, 5).map((habit) => {
                        const isCompleted = todayCompletions.includes(habit.id)
                        return (
                          <div key={habit.id} className="flex items-center gap-3 py-2">
                            <div
                              className={`w-6 h-6 rounded-full border-2 flex items-center justify-center ${
                                isCompleted
                                  ? 'bg-primary border-primary text-primary-foreground'
                                  : 'border-muted-foreground'
                              }`}
                            >
                              {isCompleted && <CheckSquare className="h-3 w-3" />}
                            </div>
                            <div className="flex-1 min-w-0">
                              <p className={`font-medium truncate ${isCompleted ? 'line-through text-muted-foreground' : ''}`}>
                                {habit.name}
                              </p>
                            </div>
                          </div>
                        )
                      })}
                      {habits.length > 5 && (
                        <Link href="/habits" className="text-xs text-primary hover:underline block text-center">
                          +{habits.length - 5} more habits
                        </Link>
                      )}
                    </div>
                  )}
                </CardContent>
              </Card>

              <Card>
                <CardHeader className="flex flex-row items-center justify-between">
                  <div>
                    <CardTitle className="flex items-center gap-2">
                      <ListTodo className="h-5 w-5" />
                      Pending Tasks
                    </CardTitle>
                    <CardDescription>Tasks waiting to be done</CardDescription>
                  </div>
                  <Link href="/tasks">
                    <Button variant="ghost" size="sm" className="text-xs">
                      View all <ArrowRight className="h-3 w-3 ml-1" />
                    </Button>
                  </Link>
                </CardHeader>
                <CardContent>
                  {pendingTasks.length === 0 ? (
                    <div className="text-center py-6">
                      <ListTodo className="h-8 w-8 text-muted-foreground/40 mx-auto mb-2" />
                      <p className="text-sm text-muted-foreground">All caught up!</p>
                      <Button
                        variant="link"
                        size="sm"
                        className="text-xs mt-1"
                        onClick={() => dispatch(openModal({ modalName: 'createTask' }))}
                      >
                        <Plus className="h-3 w-3 mr-1" />
                        Add a task
                      </Button>
                    </div>
                  ) : (
                    <div className="space-y-3">
                      {pendingTasks.slice(0, 5).map((task) => (
                        <div key={task.id} className="flex items-center gap-3 py-2">
                          <div
                            className={`w-2 h-2 rounded-full ${
                              task.priority === 1 ? 'bg-red-500' :
                              task.priority === 2 ? 'bg-orange-500' :
                              'bg-blue-500'
                            }`}
                          />
                          <div className="flex-1 min-w-0">
                            <p className="font-medium truncate text-sm">{task.title}</p>
                            {task.deadline && (
                              <p className="text-xs text-muted-foreground">
                                Due: {new Date(task.deadline).toLocaleDateString()}
                              </p>
                            )}
                          </div>
                        </div>
                      ))}
                      {pendingTasks.length > 5 && (
                        <Link href="/tasks" className="text-xs text-primary hover:underline block text-center">
                          View all {pendingTasks.length} tasks
                        </Link>
                      )}
                    </div>
                  )}
                </CardContent>
              </Card>
            </div>
          </div>

          {/* Right Column - Gamification */}
          <div className="space-y-4">
            <GamificationWidget />
            <Link href="/progress" className="block">
              <Button variant="outline" className="w-full">
                <TrendingUp className="h-4 w-4 mr-2" />
                View Full Progress
                <ArrowRight className="h-4 w-4 ml-auto" />
              </Button>
            </Link>
          </div>
        </div>
      </motion.div>
    </PageContainer>
  )
}

function OnboardingStep({
  icon: Icon,
  label,
  description,
}: {
  icon: React.ComponentType<{ className?: string }>
  label: string
  description: string
}) {
  return (
    <div className="p-3 rounded-lg border border-border/50 hover:border-primary/30 hover:bg-primary/5 transition-colors cursor-pointer group">
      <div className="flex items-center gap-2 mb-1">
        <Icon className="h-4 w-4 text-primary" />
        <span className="font-medium text-sm">{label}</span>
      </div>
      <p className="text-xs text-muted-foreground">{description}</p>
    </div>
  )
}


================================================================
FILE: src/app/(dashboard)/docs/[id]/page.tsx
================================================================
'use client'

import { useEffect, useState } from 'react'
import { useParams, useRouter } from 'next/navigation'
import { motion } from 'framer-motion'
import { useAppDispatch, useAppSelector } from '@/state/hooks'
import {
  fetchDocumentById,
  updateDocument,
  deleteDocument,
  selectDocumentById,
  selectDocumentsLoading,
} from '@/state/slices/documentsSlice'
import { DocumentEditor } from '@/components/documents/DocumentEditor'
import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button'
import { cn } from '@/lib/utils'
import { ArrowLeft, Trash2, FileText } from 'lucide-react'
import Link from 'next/link'

export default function DocDetailPage() {
  const params = useParams()
  const router = useRouter()
  const dispatch = useAppDispatch()
  const id = params.id as string

  const document = useAppSelector(selectDocumentById(id))
  const isLoading = useAppSelector(selectDocumentsLoading)
  const [confirmDelete, setConfirmDelete] = useState(false)

  useEffect(() => {
    if (id) {
      dispatch(fetchDocumentById(id))
    }
  }, [dispatch, id])

  const handleSave = async (data: { title: string; content: string }) => {
    await dispatch(
      updateDocument({
        id,
        updates: {
          title: data.title,
          content: data.content,
          plainText: data.content,
        },
      })
    )
  }

  const handleDelete = async () => {
    if (!confirmDelete) {
      setConfirmDelete(true)
      return
    }
    await dispatch(deleteDocument(id))
    router.push('/docs')
  }

  if (isLoading && !document) {
    return (
      <div className="container mx-auto py-6 px-4 max-w-4xl">
        <div className="space-y-4">
          <div className="h-10 w-48 rounded bg-purple-500/5 animate-pulse" />
          <div className="h-64 rounded-xl bg-purple-500/5 animate-pulse" />
        </div>
      </div>
    )
  }

  if (!document && !isLoading) {
    return (
      <div className="container mx-auto py-6 px-4 max-w-4xl">
        <motion.div
          initial={{ opacity: 0 }}
          animate={{ opacity: 1 }}
          className="flex flex-col items-center justify-center py-16 text-center"
        >
          <FileText className="h-10 w-10 text-purple-500/30 mb-3" />
          <p className="text-muted-foreground text-sm">Document not found</p>
          <Link href="/docs">
            <Button variant="ghost" className="mt-4 text-purple-300">
              <ArrowLeft className="h-4 w-4 mr-2" />
              Back to Documents
            </Button>
          </Link>
        </motion.div>
      </div>
    )
  }

  return (
    <motion.div
      initial={{ opacity: 0 }}
      animate={{ opacity: 1 }}
      className="container mx-auto py-6 px-4 max-w-4xl"
    >
      {/* Header */}
      <motion.div
        initial={{ opacity: 0, y: -10 }}
        animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }}
        className="flex items-center justify-between mb-6"
      >
        <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
          <Link href="/docs">
            <Button
              variant="ghost"
              size="sm"
              className="text-muted-foreground hover:text-purple-300"
            >
              <ArrowLeft className="h-4 w-4 mr-1" />
              Back
            </Button>
          </Link>
        </div>

        <Button
          variant="ghost"
          size="sm"
          onClick={handleDelete}
          className={cn(
            'transition-colors',
            confirmDelete
              ? 'text-red-400 hover:text-red-300 hover:bg-red-500/10'
              : 'text-muted-foreground hover:text-red-400'
          )}
        >
          <Trash2 className="h-4 w-4 mr-1" />
          {confirmDelete ? 'Confirm Delete' : 'Delete'}
        </Button>
      </motion.div>

      {/* Editor */}
      {document && (
        <motion.div
          initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 10 }}
          animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }}
          transition={{ delay: 0.1 }}
        >
          <DocumentEditor
            initialContent={{
              title: document.title,
              content:
                typeof document.content === 'string'
                  ? document.content
                  : document.plainText ?? '',
            }}
            onSave={handleSave}
          />
        </motion.div>
      )}
    </motion.div>
  )
}


================================================================
FILE: src/app/(dashboard)/docs/new/page.tsx
================================================================
'use client'

import { useRouter } from 'next/navigation'
import { motion } from 'framer-motion'
import { useAppDispatch } from '@/state/hooks'
import { createDocument } from '@/state/slices/documentsSlice'
import { DocumentEditor } from '@/components/documents/DocumentEditor'
import { cn } from '@/lib/utils'
import { FilePlus } from 'lucide-react'

export default function NewDocPage() {
  const dispatch = useAppDispatch()
  const router = useRouter()

  const handleSave = async (data: { title: string; content: string }) => {
    const result = await dispatch(
      createDocument({
        title: data.title,
        content: data.content,
        plainText: data.content,
      })
    ).unwrap()

    if (result?.id) {
      router.push(`/docs/${result.id}`)
    }
  }

  return (
    <motion.div
      initial={{ opacity: 0 }}
      animate={{ opacity: 1 }}
      className="container mx-auto py-6 px-4 max-w-4xl"
    >
      {/* Header */}
      <motion.div
        initial={{ opacity: 0, y: -10 }}
        animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }}
        className="flex items-center gap-3 mb-6"
      >
        <div className="flex items-center justify-center h-10 w-10 rounded-xl bg-purple-500/10 border border-purple-500/20">
          <FilePlus className="h-5 w-5 text-purple-400" />
        </div>
        <div>
          <h1 className="text-2xl font-bold text-purple-50">New Document</h1>
          <p className="text-sm text-muted-foreground">
            Create a new document
          </p>
        </div>
      </motion.div>

      {/* Editor */}
      <motion.div
        initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 10 }}
        animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }}
        transition={{ delay: 0.1 }}
      >
        <DocumentEditor isNew onSave={handleSave} />
      </motion.div>
    </motion.div>
  )
}

'use client'

import { useEffect } from 'react'

export default function DocsPage() {

  useRegisterPageContext({
    pageTitle: 'Documents',
  })

    dispatch(fetchDocuments())

  return (
    <motion.div
      initial={{ opacity: 0 }}
      animate={{ opacity: 1 }}
      className="container mx-auto py-6 px-4 max-w-5xl"

      {/* Header */}

        initial={{ opacity: 0, y: -10 }}
        animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }}
        className="flex items-center justify-between mb-6"

          <div className="flex items-center justify-center h-10 w-10 rounded-xl bg-purple-500/10 border border-purple-500/20">
